rationale: Wikidata has no umbrella concept for user-interface commands (cancel, close, save, run, pin, etc.), so lexeme senses for these words either link to unrelated Q-items or have no P5137 at all. After deeper investigation (see probes below), the right classification is a dual P279: subclass of Q4485156 'software feature' (the real established class — 300 items are P31 of it, including Q42282254 'copy', Q42282222 'cut', Q42282161 'find', and Q513420 'Undo') AND subclass of Q1079196 'command' (honest about it also being a command class). Initially considered adding Q47146 'user interface' as a third parent (following the Q1058748 'cut, copy, and paste' precedent), but dropped because Q47146 is too broad — its direct subclasses include steering wheels, handlebars, and pedal drives. This umbrella is specifically for software UI commands. First in a series of related edits supporting multilingual Z33668 lookups on Wikifunctions.

descriptions.en: command issued by a user through a software user interface — e.g. clicking "allow"

open_questions: Should we ALSO add P279 Q47146 'user interface' to match the Q1058748 precedent? Current lean: no, Q47146 is too broad (includes physical controls). Decision recorded; revisit if a maintainer pushes back.

Should the umbrella also carry a P31 claim (e.g. P31 Q16889133 'class' or P31 Q17537576 'category of things')? Current ops don't include one; checking ~44 direct subclasses of Q4485156 showed most don't have a P31 beyond inheritance.
Are there existing items under Q1079196 or Q4485156 that should be RECLASSIFIED as P31 of our new umbrella (rather than just living at the same level)? See related_followups.

related_followups.summary: Reclassify Q42282XXX 'software feature' family as P31 of new umbrella
related_followups.notes: Q42282254 'copy', Q42282222 'cut', Q42282161 'find' — currently only P31 Q4485156. After umbrella lands, these would naturally be P31 of it too (they ARE UI commands), which gives Z33668 lookups on the UI-command sense a cleaner path. One edit per item.

related_followups.summary: Reclassify Q513420 'Undo' as P31 of new umbrella
related_followups.notes: Currently P31 Q4485156 + P279 Q1079196. Could be re-expressed as P31 of our umbrella (which itself is P279 of both those classes). Simplifies the classification and matches the pattern set by the Q42282XXX family.

related_followups.summary: Consider adding P31 of new umbrella to Q1058748 / Q3980110 / Q66018493
related_followups.notes: These already have multiple P279 parents including Q1079196 'command' and Q47146 'user interface'. Adding P31 of our umbrella would make them formally instances of the UI-command class without removing their existing relationships.

related_followups.summary: Fix the Q1079196 'command' → Q846882 'sources of law' upchain
related_followups.notes: Not specific to our umbrella, but our new item will inherit this quirky upchain too. Already captured as a separate backlog proposal: investigate-command-sources-of-law.

zblocks/i18n/mappings.json uses Q3305941 as the concept for 'save'. But Q3305941 is 'save' in the goalkeeper/soccer sense (an act of a goaltender stopping the ball). This generates incorrect Z33668 lookups. Once our umbrella lands, a 'save (software feature)' Q-item should be created (analogous to Q42282254 'copy') and zblocks mappings updated.
